title: HR Survey & Feedback System
summary: A custom solution for HR teams to gather employee feedback, conduct surveys, and analyze workplace sentiment.
description: An internal tool for a private client, designed to help HR teams collect and analyze employee feedback through surveys and sentiment analysis. The platform includes features for creating surveys, tracking responses, and generating insights to improve workplace culture.

title: AgroSense Platform
summary: A custom platform for calculating and optimizing agricultural formulas, calculating costs and providing insights for better decision making.
description: A custom platform for calculating and optimizing agricultural formulas, calculating costs, storing and managing formulas and company information.
